name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true'.

name: taskField
label: Task label field
description: Field shown as the bar/row label, e.g. 'short_description'.

name: startField
label: Start date field
description: Date/datetime field for the bar start, e.g. 'start_date' or 'planned_start_date'.

name: endField
label: End date field
description: Date/datetime field for the bar end, e.g. 'end_date' or 'due_date'.

name: groupField
label: Group field (optional)
description: Field used to colour bars and build the legend, e.g. 'type', a phase, or 'assignment_group'. Blank = one colour.

name: progressField
label: Progress field (optional)
description: Numeric field for the progress overlay, e.g. 'percent_complete'. A 0..100 percent is normalised to 0..1.

name: idField
label: Id field (optional)
description: Field used as the task id (defaults to the record's sys_id).

name: colorField
label: Color field (optional)
description: Field holding a per-bar colour override (a CSS color / hex).

name: useDisplayValue
label: Use display values for labels/groups
description: Label the bars and groups by display value (readable) instead of raw value.

name: maxTasks
label: Max tasks
description: Maximum bars to return (setLimit on the query). Default 500.
